title: Noah / Nuh
similarities: Noah is portrayed as righteous among his people.
A destructive flood is sent as judgment.
The faithful are delivered through divine command.
Afterward there is a sign of renewed order.

differences.description: The Qur’an highlights a son who rejects the warning and is lost in the flood.
Genesis includes the rainbow as a covenant sign with all living beings.

commentary_notes: Noah narratives combine moral warning with hope for renewal.
Comparative mapping can track how covenant motifs develop later.
